asset.title: Startup Diligence Live Join
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The video demonstrates creating a collaborative diligence room and having a second user join via a room code, showing real-time state synchronization.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows room creation and joining via code clearly, though transitions are quick.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Covers the end-to-end flow of creating, sharing, joining, and interacting.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode interface with clear layout, though dense with information.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's multi-agent and collaborative workspace concept.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured from a live working web application with realistic data.

legibility.evidence: Text and codes are readable, though some UI elements are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for startup diligence and financial collaboration use cases.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the multi-user joining process without simulated effects.

defects.observed: The transition to the second user's perspective (Priya) is abrupt.
defects.fix: Add a brief visual transition or clearer label to distinguish user perspectives.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Collaborate in real-time with teammates and NodeAgents by sharing a secure room code.
